name: Free Body Diagram: Inclined Plane
description:
This dynamic simulation illustrates the forces acting on a block of mass $m$ sliding down an inclined plane at an angle $\theta$. The relevant forces are:

1.  **Gravity (W):** $W = mg$ directed downwards.
2.  **Normal Force (N):** $N = mg \cos(\theta)$ directed perpendicular to the surface.
3.  **Friction (f):** $f = \mu_k N$ opposing the motion (we assume $\mu_k = 0.2$ for this demo).

The net force driving the block down the incline is $F_{net} = mg \sin(\theta) - f$. Adjust the sliders to see how the angle and mass affect the magnitude and direction of the force vectors!
